sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current feet: rows 14-18, cols 14-18 (left) and rows 44-48, cols 39-43 (right)
# Let me first move left feet to rows 19-23 by pressing DOWN, then check if they can move down further.

action(['DOWN'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Feet: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Now try to move down again
action(['DOWN'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Feet after 2nd DOWN: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
